headline.title: IAIP biologics for sepsis
headline.tagline: Plasma-derived IAIP for early sepsis — Brown/RI Hospital science, Takeda global license
headline.thesis: ProThera Biologics is the Rhode Island originator of inter-alpha inhibitor protein (IAIP) replacement therapy for early sepsis and critical illness. Brown and Rhode Island Hospital research links low IAIP levels to mortality and shows replacement improves outcomes in preclinical models. The platform is de-risked by a global Takeda license (Apr 2020) funding IND-enabling work; this $400,000 RI package does not duplicate Takeda development—it funds a biomarker-enriched ICU pilot, GMP analytics, and pre-IND documentation with physician syndicate oversight (Dr. Cheston Cunha, infectious disease/critical care). Comparable path runs Takeda pharma deal → plasma commercial models (Kamada, Cinryze) and pairs with FDA-cleared sepsis host-response diagnostics (SeptiCyte, TriVerity) for stratified enrollment. $240,000 clinical / $160,000 R&D; 50% physician syndicate / 50% Slater SSBCI match.
headline.indication: early sepsis and critical illness — IAIP biologic therapeutic
headline.ri_institution: Brown University / Rhode Island Hospital / ProThera Biologics
headline.data_caveat: Global IAIP program licensed to Takeda (Apr 2020). RI co-investment package funds local ICU biomarker-enriched pilot and physician validation — not a duplicate of Takeda IND.

lead_comparable.name: Takeda (ProThera IAIP license)
lead_comparable.inferred_development: IND-enabling → Takeda-led plasma-derived IAIP trials + companion Dx
lead_comparable.inferred_financing: Global licensing deal (Apr 2020); Takeda assumes all development funding (terms undisclosed)

snapshot.next_milestone: Q1: IAIP assay correlation with host-response Dx in RI ICU biobank samples
snapshot.financing_rationale: $400K RI package: $240K funds biomarker-enriched ICU pilot design and IRB-ready protocol (physician syndicate oversight); $160K covers GMP analytics, IAIP assay validation, and pre-IND documentation. Takeda license de-risks global development; RI capital proves local clinical credibility for Slater SSBCI match and Right Hill follow-on.

publications.title: ProThera Biologics, Inc.: A Novel Immunomodulator and Biomarker for Life-Threatening Diseases
Correlation between mortality and the levels of inter-alpha inhibitors in the plasma of patients with severe sepsis
Longitudinal studies of inter-alpha inhibitor proteins in severely septic patients: a potential clinical marker and mediator of severe sepsis

evidence.narrative: Inter-alpha inhibitor proteins (IAIP) are endogenous serine protease inhibitors depleted in severe sepsis; failure to recover IAIP levels correlates with mortality (PubMed 17205024). RI Hospital/Brown research (Lim, Hixson) showed IAIP replacement improves survival in E. coli sepsis models (PubMed 12964125). ProThera holds RI-origin IP, NIH SBIR-funded manufacturing, and a 2020 Takeda global license — the only plasma-derived IAIP platform with pharma-backed IND-enabling path. Pairs with FDA-cleared sepsis host-response diagnostics (Inflammatix, Immunexpress) for stratified ICU pilots.
